title: Heracles Button
description: Access your Quests from your Inventory
body:
# Heracles Button

This is a simple mod which adds an inventory button to open the quest screen of Heracles.

![How the button looks like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HibJK04a/images/697b69e525b7e3499fb756b82bca0da9dcdd0de6.png)
